note: One row per archive day: observed daily LWAP per grid, the Visayas-Luzon spread, recorded curtailment, the operator's matched scheduled-out MW, the day's observed hydro water, advisory counts (HVDC events, alerts), the day's real-time binding constraints, and the dearest regional reserve price. Every column is observed data from the archive; nothing here is modeled.
disclaimer: Statistical indicators derived from public data. Patterns may have legitimate explanations.
